name: Asana
description: Asana project management: workspaces, projects, sections, tasks (incl. subtasks, comments, moves) and typeahead search for users and tasks. Personal Access Token auth.

credentials_required.label: Asana Personal Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Create at app.asana.com/0/my-apps -> 'Personal access tokens' section -> Create new token. NOT the OAuth developer apps section.

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List all Asana workspaces the token has access to

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List projects in a workspace (filter: archived, limit)

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get project details by project gid

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks filtered by project, assignee (use 'me' for current user), or section

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get full task details by task gid (name, notes, assignee, due_on, subtasks, tags)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task with workspace/project, name, notes, assignee, due date

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task (name, notes, assignee, due_on)

tools.name: add_comment_to_task
tools.description: Add a comment (story) to a task

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: List comments on a task (stories of type comment)

tools.name: list_subtasks
tools.description: List subtasks of a parent task

tools.name: create_subtask
tools.description: Create a subtask under a parent task

tools.name: move_task_to_section
tools.description: Move a task into a specific section of a project

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Typeahead search for users in a workspace by name or email (returns gid + name)

tools.name: search_tasks
tools.description: Typeahead search for tasks in a workspace by name fragment

author: freddy-schuetz
